en: Why don't you tell me what's going on Why don't you tell me who's on the phone
ja: 電話の相手を教えてよ。
zhTW: 你何不告訴我電話那頭是誰？
vi: Sao ban khong noi cho toi biet ai dang goi?

en: Why don't you ask him what's going wrong Why don't you ask him the list on the throne
ja: 何がうまくいかないのか聞いてみたら？
zhTW: 你何不問他出了什麼問題？
vi: Sao ban khong hoi anh ay co gi sai?

en: Don't say that you love me Just tell me that you want me
ja: 愛してるなんて言わないで。
vi: Dung noi rang ban yeu toi.
